name: Classic Beef Burger
description: Juicy grilled beef burger with melted cheddar cheese, fresh lettuce, tomato, and our signature sauce.

description: A delicious Thai-style pizza topped with grilled chicken, colorful vegetables, mozzarella cheese, and a spicy Thai sauce.

description: Creamy Alfredo fettuccine with parmesan cheese and a rich homemade white sauce.

name: Mixed Fruit Juice
description: Freshly squeezed mixed fruit juice made with a blend of seasonal fruits like orange, grape, and pineapple.

description: Mini sweet pizzas topped with fresh seasonal fruits, cream, and a light glaze.

name: Thai Chicken Pizza
description: Thai-style pizza with grilled chicken, colorful vegetables, mozzarella cheese, and spicy Thai sauce.

description: A gourmet pizza topped with fresh peaches, basil leaves, mozzarella, and a balsamic glaze.
